context: Tests whether the agent builds a normalized unified spend data model with the correct schema, stores and uses platform-specific attribution windows, tracks new customer vs returning customer campaigns separately, normalizes spend to per-day rates for period comparison, builds a spend pacing calculation, computes channel concentration, and produces a weekly marketing report with the expected fields.

checklist.name: Unified schema columns
checklist.description: Data model or output includes all of: spend_date, platform, channel_type, campaign_id/name, spend_amount, impressions, clicks, platform_conversions, platform_revenue, attribution_window

checklist.name: Attribution windows stored
checklist.description: Stores or labels data with platform-specific attribution windows: Meta as '7d_click_1d_view', Google as 'last_click_30d', TikTok as '7d_click'

checklist.name: New vs returning split
checklist.description: Separates new customer acquisition campaigns from retention/remarketing campaigns, reporting ROAS or CAC for each segment distinctly

checklist.name: Per-day spend normalization
checklist.description: Normalizes spend to per-day rates (spend / number_of_days) rather than using raw period totals for period comparisons

checklist.name: Spend pacing calculation
checklist.description: Computes spend pacing: tracks cumulative spend vs monthly budget, showing how much of the monthly budget has been consumed relative to elapsed days in the month

checklist.name: MER computed
checklist.description: Computes MER (total revenue / total marketing spend across all channels) as a portfolio-level metric

checklist.name: Channel concentration metric
checklist.description: Computes channel concentration or share-of-spend per platform, flagging if any single platform exceeds a majority share (e.g., 50%+) of total spend

checklist.name: Weekly report fields
checklist.description: Formatted weekly report includes: total spend, total attributed revenue, blended ROAS, and a per-channel table with spend, ROAS, and week-over-week delta

checklist.name: Channel status flag
checklist.description: Weekly report marks each channel as 'OK' or 'REVIEW' based on whether its ROAS meets a break-even or target threshold

checklist.name: Branded vs non-branded separation
checklist.description: Google search campaigns are split into branded and non-branded segments, with separate ROAS reported for each

checklist.name: Prospecting CAC computed
checklist.description: Computes Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC = spend / conversions) specifically for prospecting/new-customer campaigns, as a distinct metric from ROAS

checklist.name: Attribution window note
checklist.description: Output or code includes a note or comment that direct cross-platform ROAS comparison is affected by differing attribution windows, recommending first-party standardization
